title: Assam State Zoo cum Botanical Garden
tagline: Assam State Zoo cum Botanical Garden — wildlife reserve of Assam

heroImage.alt: Assam State Zoo cum Botanical Garden, Assam

overview.short: The Assam State Zoo cum Botanical Garden (popularly known as Guwahati Zoo) is the largest of its kind in the North East region and it is spread across 432 acre (175 hectare).
overview.description: The Assam State Zoo cum Botanical Garden (popularly known as Guwahati Zoo) is the largest of its kind in the North East region and it is spread across 432 acre (175 hectare). The zoo is located within the Hengrabari Reserved Forest at Guwahati, India. The zoo is home to about more than 1125 numbers of animals, birds and reptiles representing over 115 species of animals and birds from around the world. The Divisional officer of Assam State Zoo is Dr.

nearestAirport.name: Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport, Guwahati

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Guwahati City Centre Mall
topPlaces.description: Guwahati City Centre Mall is a shopping complex located in Guwahati, Assam, India. It is located in Christian Basti and it is also one of the largest malls of Assam and Northeast India.

topPlaces.name: Ganeshguri
topPlaces.description: Ganeshguri is a locality in Guwahati, Assam, India, and is named after lord Ganesh. There was a Heramba kingdom.

topPlaces.name: Bhangagarh
topPlaces.description: Bhangagarh is a locality in Guwahati, Assam, India. It is surrounded by the localities of Paltan Bazaar, Chandmari and Ganeshguri.

topPlaces.name: Guwahati Tea Auction Centre
topPlaces.description: The Guwahati Tea Auction Centre (GTAC) is one of the busiest tea trading facilities in the world. It is located in Guwahati and its primary commodity under the hammer is Assam tea.

topPlaces.name: Janata Bhawan
topPlaces.description: Janata Bhawan is the secretariat complex of the Government of Assam, located in Dispur, the capital of the Indian state of Assam. The complex houses the administrative offices of the state government and serves as the principal seat of executive governance in Assam.

topPlaces.name: Hengrabari
topPlaces.description: Hengrabari is a district in the capital city of Guwahati of Assam, a state on the north-east of India. Densely populated, Hengrabari resembles the character of a small town in the heart of Guwahati.

topPlaces.name: Jatia
topPlaces.description: Jatia is a locality in the city of Guwahati. It is speculated to be the ancient capital of Assam, known under the name of Pragjyotishpura.

topPlaces.name: Noonmati
topPlaces.description: Noonmati is a locality located in Guwahati, Assam in North East India. It is the place where Indian Oil Company (now the Indian Oil Corporation) commissioned its first oil refinery, the Guwahati Refinery on 1 January 1962.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Assam State Zoo cum Botanical Garden?
faq.a: The best time to visit Assam State Zoo cum Botanical Garden is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Assam State Zoo cum Botanical Garden?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport, Guwahati (21 km) and the nearest railway station is Guwahati Railway Station (4 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Assam State Zoo cum Botanical Garden?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Assam State Zoo cum Botanical Garden at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Assam State Zoo cum Botanical Garden?
faq.a: Stays in Assam State Zoo cum Botanical Garden start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Assam State Zoo cum Botanical Garden?
faq.a: The top attractions are Guwahati City Centre Mall, Ganeshguri, Bhangagarh, Guwahati Tea Auction Centre, Janata Bhawan.
